LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsDirective_Entry: Great Infernal Gate is calibrated. Draft the strike team, then order entry. Current flow: {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsDirective_EntryDeployed: Strike team is already inside the dominion slice. Jump to them or extract them before disarming the gate.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisReminderStandby: Great Infernal Gate remains calibrated. Stability: {0}. Strike-team flow: {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketFlowFail_NotReady: The Great Infernal Gate is not ready for strike-team entry on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketFlowFail_NoSession: No active dominion strike team is linked to this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketFlowStatus_Deployed: strike team deployed inside dominion slice
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketCommand_EnterDesc: Insert the drafted strike team into the temporary dominion slice. If no drafted colonists are available, selected colonists are used as a fallback.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketCommand_JumpDesc: Jump to the active dominion slice linked to this Great Infernal Gate.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketCommand_ExtractDesc: Recall all player pawns from the active dominion slice and collapse the temporary runtime map.
